writing_guidelines.main_body_strategy: RFS values theoretical rigor combined with empirical evidence. Balance theory and data.
writing_guidelines.figure_strategy: Standard finance figures. Time-series, cross-sectional sorts, or model-implied vs. realized.
writing_guidelines.table_strategy: Standard finance table format: panel structure, robust standard errors, significance stars.
writing_guidelines.proof_strategy: Full proofs in appendix. Main body includes proposition statements and economic intuition.
writing_guidelines.related_work_placement: Separate literature review section after introduction.

common_pitfalls: Not motivating the economic question clearly enough
